text: This report reviews the major trade associations in which our company belongs and their climate policies, particularly as they align with the Paris Agreement.
We have mapped our public disclosures of 2024 data to the sustainability-related topics identified by SASB as most significant for the electric and natural gas industries.

We are participating in initiatives led by Edison Electric Institute and American Gas Association to promote consistency and transparency in sustainability reporting across the energy utility sector. As part of these efforts, we are presenting environmental, social and governance information in a combined EEI and AGA reporting template.

We are participating in initiatives led by Edison Electric Institute and American Gas Association to promote consistency and transparency in sustainability reporting across the energy utility sector. As part of these efforts, we are presenting environmental, social and governance information in a combined EEI and AGA reporting template.

We have disclosed information regarding our operations and ESG goals, risks and opportunities to CDP for more than a decade. CDP, formerly the Carbon Disclosure Project, is a nongovernmental organization that runs a disclosure system to help companies, cities, states and regions measure and manage their environmental impacts.

Leidos employees invest their time, talent, and resources to create impact that lasts for generations

Leidos is known for maintaining the highest standards of integrity and ethical behavior, and this extends fully to how we manage data privacy and cybersecurity. We apply industry-leading data privacy and cybersecurity standards in our day-to-day business.
Our efforts to empower our employees, improve our communities, and preserve the environment shape the way we do business.
